decisions.question: CLI command structure: how do users invoke Mermaid export and HTML preview?
Mermaid representation: how to map compiled template concepts to stateDiagram-v2 syntax?
decisions.chosen: minimal mapping (states, transitions, gates as notes)

decisions.question: HTML generation architecture: template embedding, CDN pinning, data injection, output paths?
Visual design: state type encoding, dark mode, edge labels, badges?
decisions.chosen: dark mode + start marker, skip badges/end markers

decisions.question: Unified export command: how does clap handle format-dependent flag validation (--open only for html, --check requires --output, --format html requires --output)?
How should --check freshness comparison be implemented (byte comparison, error format, missing vs stale)?
How should the GHA reusable workflow be structured (template discovery, binary download, versioning)?
